description:
lib.rs:242:
```rust
if data_map.as_object().map(|m| m.is_empty()).unwrap_or(false) {
```

Idiomatic since Rust 1.70 (workspace MSRV is 1.75):
```rust
if data_map.as_object().is_some_and(|m| m.is_empty()) {
```

Both expressions evaluate identically; is_some_and reads as a single thought instead of three method calls. clippy lints this with clippy::unnecessary_map_or in newer versions.

P2 idiom finding (clippy-tier).
title: Use is_some_and instead of .map(...).unwrap_or(false) on Option
